title: fix(desktop): block malformed proposal canon targets

proof_reviewed.summary: 303 pass, 1 skip, 0 fail, 1020 expect() calls; verify:v0 5/5; Mintlify validate and broken-links passed; Electron build passed; bun audit found no vulnerabilities
Malformed YAML target returns blocked receipt, keeps proposal in needs_approval, and leaves the target file unchanged.
Reviewed proposal-store implementation/test diff, IPC/preload decision path, and file-backed canon mutation behavior.

caveats: No screenshot was captured because this is a backend/Electron store change; the included JSON receipt is the evaluation data.
Residual non-diff risk remains that accepted proposal targets can reference arbitrary local paths; this behavior existed before PR #43 and was not widened here.
